name: Seed a synthetic 7-file NAS, crawl it with the file-ops `crawl` op (streaming `{path,size,mtime}` batches over the `crawl` control channel, batch_size 3), gather-fold the batches, then REGISTER each file BY REFERENCE via log_artifact(upload=False): the runner hashes each file locally and uploads NOTHING (the bytes stay on the file server), and a single log_artifact call fills BOTH halves server-side — the content-addressed catalogue_entries row AND the physical file_inventory copy at (file_server_id, reference_path). No HTTP, no urllib. All 7 files have distinct content, so files_registered is 7.
